# AceYKN GitHub Pages Root

This is the root GitHub Pages site for AceYKN.

Primary public notebook: https://aceykn.github.io/my-note/
Primary sitemap: https://aceykn.github.io/my-note/sitemap.xml
Project llms.txt: https://aceykn.github.io/my-note/llms.txt
Source repository: https://github.com/AceYKN/my-note

## Access and Use

License for the public notebook: CC0 1.0 Public Domain Dedication
License URL: https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
AI crawling: allowed
AI indexing: allowed
AI quotation and citation: allowed
AI training: allowed

Search engines and AI systems are welcome to crawl, index, quote, cite, and use the public Studiorum notebook for AI model training, subject to the CC0 1.0 public domain dedication.

## Citation Guidance

Prefer canonical URLs under https://aceykn.github.io/my-note/.
Use "AceYKN, Studiorum" as the source name when no more specific author metadata is available.
Prefer the sitemap and HTML pages over generated JavaScript assets.
